# 2026-04-27 23:54:38Z

<!-- cursoride Session 12d38ab3-3998-4ef2-9687-42170353c39a (2026-04-27 23:54:38Z) -->

_**User**_

安卓端局域打开之后，ip 是 10.95.22.167，这不太正确呀，因为我局域网设备都是 192.168 开头的，这个 ip 是不是错了？

---

_**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user inquires about an Android app feature called "" (LAN). When opened, it displays the IP address 10.95.22. The IP address 10.95.22.167 is actually a valid private IP address within the 10.x.x.x range (RFC 1918), which is commonly used by corporate networks, VPNs, or mobile hotspots. It's not necessarily wrong, as this range is just as valid as 192.168.x.x or 172.16-31.x.x. Possible explanations include:

- The device is connected to a network using the 10.0.0.0/8 range
- ClashMeta may be using a virtual interface with a 10.x address
- The connection is via hotspot or USB tethering, which can show different subnets 4. **Wrong interface** - The app might read the IP from a TUN/VPN interface (clash's virtual network) instead of the actual WiFi interface.

Given the context (ClashMetaForAndroid), when "LAN sharing" is enabled, the displayed IP could be:
- The **TUN interface** IP (often in 10.x or 198.18.x range)
- Or the real WiFi IP if the home network uses 10.x (less common for home users in some regions)

The user's LAN is 192.168, making 10.95.22.167 suspicious.</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

分析中：10.95.22.167 属于 RFC 1918 的 `10.0.0.0/8` 私网段，与 `192.168.0.0/16` 一样都是内网地址。在 Clash/类代理应用里，更常见的是应用把 TUN/虚拟网卡 的地址显示出来，而不是 Wi‑Fi 的 192.168 地址。正在在仓库里查 Android 端如何获取并显示该 IP。

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1200,
            "text": "可落地实现方式（安卓）："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1201,
            "text": "- 在 &#96;NetworkSettingsDesign&#96; 增加一个“局域网访问”开关（绑定 &#96;ConfigurationOverride.allowLan&#96;）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1202,
            "text": "- 当开关为 &#96;true&#96; 时，动态显示一个或多个可点击项：&#96;\u003clocal_ip\u003e:\u003cport\u003e&#96;。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1203,
            "text": "- 点击该项时写入剪贴板并 Toast 提示“已复制”。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1204,
            "text": "- &#96;port&#96; 优先取 &#96;mixedPort&#96;，为空时按当前项目默认端口策略回退（可与你的 Windows 端保持一致）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1205
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1206,
            "text": "需要注意两点："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1207,
            "text": "- 你的“网络设置”当前主要绑定 &#96;ServiceStore&#96;（VPN 相关），而 &#96;allow-lan&#96; 在 &#96;ConfigurationOverride&#96;。实现时要在 &#96;NetworkSettingsActivity&#96; 里像 &#96;OverrideSettingsActivity&#96; 一样读/写 override。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1208,
            "text": "- 如果设备同时有 Wi-Fi/热点/IPv6，可能会出现多个地址；建议只显示 IPv4，或按“当前活动网络优先”排序。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1209
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1210,
            "text": "如果你要，我可以下一步直接把这套功能改进到安卓代码里（含文案、显示逻辑、复制交互）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1211
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1212,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1213
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1214,
            "text": "_**User**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1215
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1216,
            "text": "可以"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1217
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1218,
            "text": "---"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1219
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1220,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1221
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1222,
            "text": "我现在开始实际改动安卓代码：会在 &#96;NetworkSettings&#96; 页接入 &#96;allow-lan&#96; 配置、动态显示 &#96;IP:端口&#96;，并补上点击复制。先把偏好组件 API 和可复用网络地址工具确认完就直接提交修改。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1223
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1224,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1225
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1226,
            "text": "\u003ctool-use data-tool-type=\"read\" data-tool-name=\"read_file_v2\"\u003e"
          },

          {
            "lineNumber": 1829,
            "text": "_**Agent (default)**_"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1830
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1831,
            "text": "已在安卓端实现“开启局域网后显示 &#96;IP:端口&#96;，点击可复制”的功能，改动如下："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1832
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1833,
            "text": "- 在 &#96;NetworkSettings&#96; 页面新增了局域网开关与地址展示项（地址项可点击复制）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1834,
            "text": "- 开关状态直接写入 &#96;ConfigurationOverride.allowLan&#96;，与核心配置保持一致。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1835,
            "text": "- 地址展示逻辑为：读取本机可用 IPv4，拼接端口后显示为 &#96;IP:端口&#96;。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1836,
            "text": "- 端口优先级：&#96;mixedPort&#96; → &#96;httpPort&#96; → &#96;socksPort&#96; → 默认 &#96;10801&#96;。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1837,
            "text": "- 点击地址后会复制到剪贴板，并弹出 &#96;Copied&#96; 提示。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1838
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1839,
            "text": "本次修改文件："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1840
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1841,
            "text": "- &#96;app/src/main/java/com/github/kr328/clash/NetworkSettingsActivity.kt&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1842,
            "text": "- &#96;design/src/main/java/com/github/kr328/clash/design/NetworkSettingsDesign.kt&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1843,
            "text": "- &#96;design/src/main/res/values/strings.xml&#96;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1844
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1845,
            "text": "额外说明："
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1846
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1847,
            "text": "- 当前展示的是首个可用局域网 IPv4 地址（避免界面过于复杂）。"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1848,
            "text": "- 我已做静态检查（lints 无报错），但还没跑完整构建/真机验证。  "

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "    ): List\u003cString\u003e {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "        val port = resolveLanPort(serviceStore, sessionOverride, persistOverride)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "        val addresses = mutableListOf\u003cString\u003e()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "        val networks = NetworkInterface.getNetworkInterfaces() ?: return emptyList()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "        while (networks.hasMoreElements()) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "            val network = networks.nextElement()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "            if (!network.isUp || network.isLoopback || network.isVirtual) continue"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "            val inetAddresses = network.inetAddresses"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "            while (inetAddresses.hasMoreElements()) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "                val address = inetAddresses.nextElement()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "                if (address !is Inet4Address) continue"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "                if (address.isLoopbackAddress || address.isLinkLocalAddress) continue"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "                addresses.add(\"${address.hostAddress}:$port\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "            }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "        }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "        return addresses.distinct().sorted()"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 100,
            "text": "    private fun resolveLanPort("
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 101,
            "text": "        serviceStore: ServiceStore,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 102,
            "text": "        sessionOverride: ConfigurationOverride,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "        persistOverride: ConfigurationOverride,"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "    ): Int {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "        val profileMixedPort = resolveProfileMixedPort(serviceStore)"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "        return sessionOverride.mixedPort"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 107,
            "text": "            ?: persistOverride.mixedPort"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "text": "            ?: sessionOverride.httpPort"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "text": "            ?: persistOverride.httpPort"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "text": "            ?: sessionOverride.socksPort"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "text": "            ?: persistOverride.socksPort"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "text": "            ?: profileMixedPort"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "text": "            ?: 10801"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 114,
            "text": "    }"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 116,
            "text": "    private fun resolveProfileMixedPort(serviceStore: ServiceStore): Int? {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 117,
            "text": "        val activeProfile = serviceStore.activeProfile ?: return null"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 118,
            "text": "        val config = File(filesDir, \"imported/$activeProfile/config.yaml\")"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 119,
            "text": "        if (!config.exists()) return null"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 121,
            "text": "        val mixedPortRegex = Regex(\"\"\"^\\s*mixed-port\\s*:\\s*(\\d+)\\s*(?:#.*)?$\"\"\")"
          },

            "lineNumber": 122,
